name: AUGMANITAI
description: Terminology reference for phenomena at the human-AI interface. Exposes a subset of AUGMANITAI core terms covering linguistic evolution, knowledge extraction, cognitive processes, measurement metrics, systemic effects, and terminological phenomena. Bilingual (EN/DE). Descriptive linguistic research, not normative (§1). Longitudinal n=1 terminological priority deposit (non-peer-reviewed per §11). Informed by ISO 704 / ISO 1087 / ISO 30042 (ISO-inspired, not ISO-certified — §16). Restricted applications per §20. See DISCLAIMER.md.

capabilities.name: term_lookup
capabilities.description: Retrieve complete definition and metadata for a single AUGMANITAI term

capabilities.name: term_search
capabilities.description: Full-text search across term names, definitions, and domains

capabilities.name: term_relate
capabilities.description: Find semantically related terms within the same domain

capabilities.name: term_validate_drift
capabilities.description: Check for semantic drift in term usage patterns

skills.name: Terminology Navigation
skills.description: Full access to AUGMANITAI term database with search and relationship mapping

skills.name: Multilingual Support
skills.description: Access to English and German term definitions and examples

skills.name: Domain Classification
skills.description: Semantic domain mapping and cross-domain term relationship analysis

authentication.description: AUGMANITAI terminology is publicly accessible without authentication

metadata.peerReviewStatus: longitudinal n=1 terminological priority deposit (non-peer-reviewed per §11)
metadata.restrictedApplications: Must not be used as diagnostic label, medical/psychological classification, legal categorization, HR screening, credit scoring, insurance assessment, surveillance, or profiling mechanism (§20). See DISCLAIMER.md.

rateLimit.description: No rate limiting for local terminology access

dataPolicy.description: Terminology database is read-only reference material. No user data retention.
